ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., Presidential, Midterm) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the election is currently active */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters for the election */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of voter turnout */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the election (e.g., Upcoming, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "results_announced" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the results have been announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election in which the candidate is running */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles or links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party FOREIGN KEY ("party") REFERENCES parties ("party_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting record */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the voting data (e.g., town name) */,
  "republican_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for Republican candidates */,
  "democratic_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for Democratic candidates */,
  "independent_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for Independent candidates */,
  "libertarian_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for Libertarian candidates */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election for which the data is collected */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the location */,
  "voting_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of eligible voters who voted */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes */,
  "mail_votes" INTEGER /* Number of mail-in votes */,
  "in_person_votes" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes */,
  "ballot_rejections" INTEGER /* Number of rejected ballots */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who turned out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_data_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., town/city) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the location */,
  "eligible_voters" INTEGER /* Number of eligible voters in the location */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the party */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, public) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Trend Analysis, Turnout Summary) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to generate the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path or URL of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election associated with the turnout */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voting_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  "early_voters" INTEGER /* Number of early voters */,
  "mail_voters" INTEGER /* Number of mail-in voters */,
  "in_person_voters" INTEGER /* Number of in-person voters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the historical record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "republican_votes" INTEGER /* Votes for Republican candidates in the historical election */,
  "democratic_votes" INTEGER /* Votes for Democratic candidates in the historical election */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters */,
  "voting_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of eligible voters who voted */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes */,
  "mail_votes" INTEGER /* Number of mail-in votes */,
  "in_person_votes" INTEGER /* Number of in-person votes */,
  "ballot_rejections" INTEGER /* Number of rejected ballots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who received the votes */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate won the election */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* Margin of victory in votes */,
  "runoff_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a runoff is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
